description: Complete roadmap for merging up-cli + claude-code into the UP Platform

phases.name: Plugin System & Hook Pipeline
phases.summary: Plugin manifest, loader, registry, CLI commands, polyglot hook runner, EventBridge integration, Markdown rules engine, builtin safety + verify plugins, up init integration

phases.name: Diverge-Then-Converge Agents
phases.summary: ExploreStrategy definitions, parallel agent spawning, result comparison, Rich UI, merge selection, up agent explore command, custom strategies via Markdown

phases.name: Config Generation (up sync)
phases.summary: Template renderers for CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .claude/settings.json. up sync command, auto-sync on plugin changes, init integration

phases.name: Memory Auto-Hooks
phases.summary: Error pattern extraction, auto-recall on failure, auto-record after consecutive failures, auto-index commits, memory hint injection into SESRC loop, builtin memory plugin

phases.name: Provenance Plugin & Observability
phases.summary: Provenance auto-record hooks, prompt context capture, chain verification, compliance export, builtin provenance plugin, enhanced status dashboard

phases.name: Plugin Migration & Ecosystem
phases.summary: Port code-review, security-guidance, commit-commands plugins. Marketplace registry, remote install, skill pipeline orchestration (learn -> product-loop), bisect plugin, plugin template
